data.content: Plan: Add Invariant type (Scope,State + condition string), add to KnotView/KnotCacheRecord/UpsertKnotHot/RehydrateProjection, DB migration v7 for invariants_json column, new event kinds KnotInvariantAdded/Removed, CLI --add-invariant/--remove-invariant flags, update show/prompt rendering, update skills for invariant adherence/review, add tests.
